target: Cartilage Biphasic Theory x Biofilm Matrix Mechanics

final_hypotheses.title: Biofilm Aggregate Modulus (H_a) from Confined Compression Predicts Mechanical Resistance to Debridement Better Than G'/G''
final_hypotheses.key_prediction: Confined compression of biofilm yields H_a values 10-30x lower than G' from oscillatory rheology. H_a correlates with debridement outcomes (R^2 > 0.7) better than G' (R^2 < 0.5).

final_hypotheses.title: Fixed Charge Density (FCD) of P. aeruginosa Alginate Biofilm Predicts Donnan-Mediated Cationic Antibiotic Partitioning
final_hypotheses.key_prediction: Biofilm FCD is -0.05 to -0.25 mEq/mL. Cationic antibiotic partition coefficients match Donnan predictions at low ionic strength (10-50 mM). Effect negligible at 150 mM NaCl.

final_hypotheses.title: Net Fixed Charge Density Transitions from Positive to Negative During Biofilm Maturation
final_hypotheses.key_prediction: Net FCD transitions from positive (Pel-dominated, day 1-3) to negative (alginate-dominated, day 5+). Antibiotic efficacy peaks near the zero-crossing timepoint.
final_hypotheses.conditions: Must demonstrate FCD transition in vitro before therapeutic claims

final_hypotheses.title: Streaming Potential Measurement Reveals Spatial FCD Heterogeneity in Mixed-EPS Biofilm
final_hypotheses.key_prediction: Alginate-only mutant shows negative streaming potential, Pel-only mutant shows positive, Psl-only shows ~zero. Wild-type shows spatial heterogeneity.
final_hypotheses.conditions: Must demonstrate detectable signal in alginate-only biofilm first
